meta.title: AI Automation for Small Business | Yaakov Aglamaz
meta.description: Custom AI solutions for small and medium businesses. Business process automation, API integrations, AI agents and chatbots.

hero.headline: AI Automation for Small Business
hero.subheadline: We help small and medium businesses leap forward with the AI revolution — transforming manual processes into AI-powered ones.

items.title: Israeli Customs Automation
items.description: Automated import declaration system for Israeli customs. Eliminated hours of manual document processing.
items.tech: NestJS, .NET, Azure, Claude AI, Israeli Customs API

items.title: AI Mortgage Bot
items.description: WhatsApp chatbot for mortgage broker. Natural language lead qualification.
items.tech: WhatsApp Business API, Claude AI, Node.js
items.result: Lead response time reduced from hours to seconds

items.title: Personal AI Assistant
items.description: 24/7 AI assistant managing workflows, deliveries, and automation for daily operations.
items.result: Handles grocery orders, delivery tracking, and routine tasks autonomously

items.title: Business Process Automation
items.description: Turn manual, repetitive tasks into automated workflows. Email → CRM, data entry, document processing.

items.title: API Integrations
items.description: Connect your business systems: CRMs, payment providers, government APIs, third-party services.

items.title: AI Agents & Chatbots
items.description: Custom AI assistants for customer service, lead generation, or internal operations.

items.title: Legacy System Modernization
items.description: Upgrade outdated tools with modern AI. Connect Excel sheets to real-time databases, automate Excel workflows.

about.title: 25+ Years Building Software
about.text: I'm Yaakov Aglamaz, a senior full-stack developer and architect.
about.text2: I spent years leading teams and building enterprise systems. Now I focus on helping small businesses make the leap from manual processes to intelligent automation.
about.text3: I don't sell hype. I build practical solutions that work.
about.tech: Tech: Node.js, NestJS, .NET, Python, Azure, Claude AI, OpenClaw

process.title: How We Work Together
process.timeline: Most projects: 2-4 weeks from start to finish.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We discuss your business, identify bottlenecks, and explore automation opportunities.

steps.title: Custom Solution
steps.description: I design and build a tailored system. No templates. Full source code included.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.description: Deploy to production. Optional ongoing support available.

pricing.title: Investment
pricing.intro: Projects typically range from $800 to $2,000 depending on scope and complexity.
